title: Munir heads to Tehran for mediation — Pakistan army chief visiting Iran Thursday; Naqvi visited Iran twice in one week
snippet: Pakistan's Chief of Army Staff Field Marshal Asim Munir expected to visit Iran for talks and consultations with Iranian authorities. Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi also visited Iran twice within a single week, interpreted as intensified diplomatic engagement. Pakistan relays proposals, responses, and diplomatic messages between US and Iran, maintaining fragile communication line in absence of direct engagement.
tag_reason: Munir's new Tehran visit (May 22) is a new trip distinct from previous visits. Naqvi's double visit in one week is also newly reported. This is the most intensified Pakistan mediation engagement yet.
